{{Missing Info|specifics=Description}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Magdeberg Hemispheres
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=09-19
|source=Lottery Machine No. 2 (0.12%)
|description=
|fame=43
|art=32
|fth=46
|civ=39
|tech=68
|ss1=Gaia Cabin Output +2%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +20<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000
|ss2=Gaia Cabin Output +3%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +30<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000
|ss3=Gaia Cabin Output +4%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +40<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000
|ss4=Gaia Cabin Output +6%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +60<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000
|ss5=Gaia Cabin Output +8%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +80<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000
|ss7=Gaia Cabin Output +8%<br>Per 1.2k Gaia Tech Pts, Snail HP +80<br>Gaia TECH Pts: 60,000/60,000<br>Gaia Cabin Output +7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail TECH +400
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]] Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Green Reagent Drops +3%
}}

[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Gaia Cabin Output Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Dragon Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Gaia Tech Points]]
